itemReviewed.name: Navadisha Montessori School and Institute - AGS Colony,Madipakkam

address.streetAddress: 3rd Cross Street Vijayanagar, bus stand, Kalki Nagar Main Rd, AGS Colony, Velachery, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600042, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
No response to mails or admission enquiry.
If this is the state of entry process, just cant believe how the next 10 years are going to be. Will parents concerns only listned in emails again??
Stay away from this school and there are really good Montessori schools in chennai like Abacus, Orange Tree, Redwood etc which are equally good and treat you during admission process with respect.

itemReviewed.name: Navadisha Montessori School and Institute - AGS Colony,Madipakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I got trained here a decade back. It was a rigorous course that has transformed my life. I am grateful to Rukku, Ruby, Teenaz, all the Trainers and their team as they are the best. I draw a lot of inspiration from their passionate work, down to earth attitude and their strength in holding high the Montessori Values. I guess they have set high standards that I really feel proud yet humble. Their lectures often resonate within me and guide me with my work with children.

I strongly recommend people who are serious on being the change and make education a truly learning experience for children, to opt for AMI Montessori training at Navadisha Montessori Foundation

itemReviewed.name: Navadisha Montessori School and Institute - AGS Colony,Madipakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter is in this school for the past 5 years. I am able to see her personality develop
all around. I am happy to have her in Navadisha rather than any other typical schools. They always stick to the number of children in class and don't keep expanding just because there is more interest in the school. Admission is very very few in between the years. Value Education 😊

itemReviewed.name: Navadisha Montessori School and Institute - AGS Colony,Madipakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: Yes, the experience of getting admission is not really the best of scenarios. It is not transparent and the school refuses to give any information during admission. The admission process is also very unclear. But I think over looking that, the school is very good and offers the best of attention to the kids and I love the fact that my daughter enjoys going to school

itemReviewed.name: Navadisha Montessori School and Institute - AGS Colony,Madipakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is one of the funniest episodes of my life in Chennai. My parents and kid went to the school to check out how the school looks like. We were told by the watchman that he runs the school and he is refusing admission to my kid. When we called the authorities, they refused to identify themselves on the call saying that this is the rules and it is indeed the watchman who decides. The best part was that the english used by the so called authorities (could not confirm if they are indeed authorities) was poor.

I would not send my kid to this school, even if it was the only school in Chennai as the moral standards they are setting for the kids is extremely low.

There are many other schools that we visited, that were very courteous and gave proper reasons explaining why they cant take one extra kid and how that would impact the quality. Net - I plan to update all forums with this message, so that parents can steer clear of such schools.
